analysis.object: T758: Non-Archimedean Shadow Depth Theorem depth analysis

classical_shadow_theorem.description: Shadow Depth Theorem over R and C: shadow(EML-inf) in {EML-2, EML-3}

non_archimedean_setting.description: Non-Archimedean fields: K with |x+y| <= max(|x|,|y|) -- tropical!

valuation_as_shadow.description: Valuation v: K -> R cup {inf} is a shadow map: algebraic -> measurement

na_shadow_theorem_attempt.description: NA shadow theorem: shadow_NA(EML-inf_NA object) in {EML-1, EML-2}?
na_shadow_theorem_attempt.reason: Non-Arch shadows land lower due to ultrametric structure

tropical_as_shadow.description: Tropicalization IS the NA shadow: trop(X) = shadow of X under valuation
tropical_as_shadow.reason: T758: tropicalization is the NA shadow map

surjectivity_from_shadow.description: If every tropical Hodge class = shadow of Berkovich cycle, and shadows are injective, preimage = Berkovich cycle
surjectivity_from_shadow.reason: Berkovich cycle is the intermediate object

t758_theorem.description: T758: Non-Archimedean Shadow Theorem: trop(X) = NA shadow of X^{an}. Shadow surjectivity onto Hodge classes forces Berkovich cycles to exist.
t758_theorem.reason: NA Shadow Theorem extends classical Shadow theorem to non-Arch setting
